description.unified: Attacks an enemy 3 times, dealing ??? P.DMG and increasing [(added) ???] P.DMG the target takes by [30%->25%] for [4 sec->10 sec]. Afterward, each hit inflicts 1 stack of [Mortal Wound] that deals ??? P.DMG over 16 sec. [Mortal Wound] can be stacked up to max 5 times.

Increases all allies' ATK and P.Dodge by [150->250] for 10 sec. Afterward, Roi grants [Specter's Breath] upon self for 10 sec. For the duration of [Specter's Breath], increases own ATK Spd by [(added) 250], DMG dealt to enemies by [(added) 20%], and evades all P.DMG attacks.

Moves behind an enemy and deals ??? P.DMG. Consumes stacks of [Mortal Wound] from the target adding ??? P.DMG for every 1 stack. Upon a Crit Hit recovers [(added) 2 orbs] of Mana and resets Cooldown of [Hack].

Increases Crit Chance by [(added) 300]. If normal attack is landed as a Crit Hit attacks the target 6 times, dealing additional ??? P.DMG and inflicting a stack of [Mortal Wound] with a [65%->50%] chance.

dark.unified: Auto attack DMG is boosted by 100% for the duration.
Each hit reduces the hit target's Mana by 150.

description.unified: [No Mercy] Dispels all negative effects from self, and recovers Mana by {0} upon Critial hit.
[Curtain of Darkness] For the duration of Skill, recovers own Mana by [(added) 150 every sec] and increases own DMG dealt against Bosses by {0}%.
[Hack] Increases DMG by 50%. Upon a Critical Hit, increases own ATK Spd by {0} for 5 sec.

dark.unified: Upon a Crit Hit, ATK Spd is increased by [24%->300] and Crit DMG is increased by [48%->60%] for 5 sec. Does not activate again during activation.

description.unified: Each auto attack has a {0}% chance of inflicting 1 stack of [Mortal Wound]. Each stack of [Mortal Wound] deals additional DMG equal to {1}% of ATK.

Summons the soul of Specter's Breath, Redeal for 12 sec, increasing own Crit DMG by [70%->80%]. Each time Roi casts [Blade Claw], deals additional ??? DMG to the target and inflicts [(added) 1 stack of Mortal Wound].

1.from: During the duration, [Blade Claw] does not remove [Mortal Wound].
1.to: For the duration of Skill, [Blade Claw] does not remove [Mortal Wound] stacks.
1.unified: For the duration of Skill, [Blade Claw] does not remove [Mortal Wound] stacks.

2.from: During the duration, [Blade Claw] increases P.DMG taken by 50% for 7sec.
2.to: For the duration of Skill, fixes Cooldown of [Blade Claw] to 0 sec, and additionally recovers 1 orb of Mana upon use.
2.unified: For the duration of Skill, fixes Cooldown of [Blade Claw] to 0 sec, and additionally recovers 1 orb of Mana upon use.
